reforms.description: A new reform of university education improves the system to choose professors and creates a new agency to evaluate teaching and research standards.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Enhancing the quality of education and research standards is expected to improve the skill level of graduates, thereby supporting innovation and productivity in the economy.
reforms.status_evidence: The new agency to evaluate teaching and research standards has been established.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant overhaul of the university system, aiming to improve educational outcomes and research quality, which are critical for fostering innovation.
reforms.source_quote: A new reform of university education improves the system to choose professors and creates a new agency to evaluate teaching and research standards.

reforms.description: The reform of the unemployment insurance system links benefits to training and workfare, enhancing the monitoring of active labour market programmes.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By linking unemployment benefits to training, the reform aims to enhance the skills of the workforce, thereby improving employability and supporting innovation.
reforms.status_evidence: The reform has been enacted to clarify the obligation to participate in active labour market measures.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform significantly enhances the existing unemployment insurance system by integrating training requirements, which is important for improving workforce skills.
reforms.source_quote: Reform of the unemployment insurance system links benefits to training and/or workfare.

reforms.description: The government has introduced a series of reforms aimed at improving the quality of education services, including the Law on Qualifications and Vocational Training, which seeks to standardize vocational training programs across different educational levels.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Enhancing the quality of education services is expected to improve human capital, which is crucial for productivity growth and economic development.
reforms.status_evidence: The government has addressed problems in the education system with a new series of reforms.
reforms.importance_rationale: These reforms represent a significant overhaul of the education system, aiming to improve vocational training and overall educational quality, which are critical for long-term economic growth.
reforms.source_quote: The State is responsible for framework legislation and for ensuring homogeneity of curricula, while financing and managing education is the competence of the autonomous communities.

reforms.description: The OECD recommends enhancing and better targeting R&D spending in Spain, as current levels are comparatively low despite generous tax credits for R&D outlays. This includes rethinking public support to private R&D and potentially reallocating funds from tax credits to direct grants.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Increasing R&D spending and improving its targeting can enhance productivity and innovation, leading to economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The recommendation to enhance and better target R&D spending was made in the OECD report.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform addresses systemic issues in R&D funding and aims to significantly improve the effectiveness of public and private R&D investments.
reforms.source_quote: Spending on research and development should be enhanced and better targeted.
